baseline.note: Pre-Claude solo development. Early commits include bulk initial imports which inflate the file average slightly.

factors.description: velocity_factor = commits/active_week (Claude) / commits/active_week (baseline). files_per_commit_factor = avg_files (Claude) / avg_files (baseline).
